description.value: A sacred icon of the Ecclesiarchy that incorporates a powerful conversion field generator. Worn as a gorget or pendant, the Rosarius projects a potent protective energy field around the bearer. Protection Rating 50: roll 1d100 when hit; on a result of 50 or lower, the field negates the damage entirely. On a roll of 01-15, the field Overloads and ceases to function until the end of the next round.
